meta.title: Mountain Park Tsunan — LP Mock (Pivot & Specialized Infrastructure Strategy)
meta.description: Mountain Park Tsunan pivoted from general skiing to education and competition. LP mock for 40 ha campus, Nordic sport, and English Adventure.

banner.text: Functional pivot · spatial redefinition strategy | Evaluation for Category 1 → standalone site

hero.title:
Mountain Park
Tsunan
hero.stat: Competition hub CC · roller · Education hub English Adventure

pivot.title:
Lifts stopped.
Space rewritten.
pivot.lead: The former mass-market ski area ended public alpine skiing. ~400,000 m² reallocated to competition training and English immersion camps—a year-round specialized infrastructure built for unstable snowfall.
pivot.noticeBody: We do not operate lift-served public downhill skiing. We guide Nordic programs, education, and course use by advance reservation.
pivot.imgAlt: Athletes on a cross-country course reusing former ski terrain

primary.title: Climate-adaptive competition hub
primary.lead: Dedicated XC courses on former ski terrain. Flex to 2.5 km / 2 km special courses in low snow. Summer roller-ski course hosts SEIKO SPORTSLINK timed events—from machine-intensive to terrain-capital model.
primary.imgAlt: Summer roller-ski course—year-round competition infrastructure against snow risk

secondary.title: 40 ha isolation space
secondary.lead: Hills, lake, cedar forest, low elements—former ski land becomes one of Japan's largest outdoor education campuses. Five screen-free immersion days offer premium exclusivity for urban families.

camp.title:
Put down screens,
immerse in English.
camp.lead: English outdoor camps run by Panorama LLC. Year-round from 4-night/5-day to 8-night/9-day for grades 1–9 through winter break. Former lodge base with nurse on site, multipurpose hall, craft house—glamping from summer 2025.
camp.imgAlt: Children at camp fire communicating in English—English Adventure

nordic.title:
Terrain is
competitive capital.
nordic.lead: Regular top-tier SAJ races including the 28th Tsunan Cross-Country Ski Championship (SAJ23-CC-49/97). NPO Tap runs operations with thorough regional flow management to Kagan Port Shimodai parking. Trial runs ¥800 adults, ¥500 students (season pass may apply).
nordic.noticeBody: XC and roller-ski courses require advance reservation. Contact Panorama LLC.
nordic.imgAlt: Cross-country course hosting SAJ certified events

journey.title:
From Tokyo,
five days apart.
journey.lead: For education-focused urban families—charter buses and private-car discounts designed to trigger family trips around Tsunan.

01.title: Shinjuku · Nagoya · Osaka
01.body: Official charter bus (~3 hours via Kan-Etsu)

02.title: 40 ha campus
02.body: English experiences among lake, hills, low elements

04.title: Craft & camp fire
04.body: Nights to sing, make, and talk in English

pivot.title: Pivot—from ski area to education campus
pivot.body: Suspending public skiing is pivot, not decline. Escape lift maintenance and snow dependence; reallocate 40 ha isolation to English immersion and competition training. Soft (purpose) shift over hard renovation—a climate-change survival model.

nordicGuide.title: Nordic & roller—climate-adaptive competition infrastructure
nordicGuide.body: Special-course shortening in low snow, summer roller events, Tap + town center governance. From machine-intensive alpine to terrain-capital Nordic—a blueprint for low-cost year-round competition hubs.

campGuide.title: Complete English Adventure guide
campGuide.body: Five screen-free days, glamping, charter bus and car discounts. How former ski land became a blue ocean in education—a premium package for urban families.

access.line: Kamigo Kamida Ko 1745-1, Tsunan, Nakauonuma-gun, Niigata
access.note: About 50 minutes by car from Kan-Etsu Shiozawa-Ishiuchi IC · about 10 minutes by car from JR Echigo-Tanaka Station · 300 parking spaces
